title: hieracium megalodon
side_effects: Hieracium megalodon can have side effects if used improperly, such as inducing severe allergic reactions, which can manifest as hives, itching, and difficulty breathing. In some cases, excessive consumption of the plant's leaves or flowers can lead to digestive issues, including nausea, vomiting, and diarrhea. Prolonged exposure to the plant's toxins can also cause liver damage and impaired kidney function. If ingested in large quantities, Hieracium megalodon can even lead to hallucinations, tremors, and seizures in rare instances.
